prompt: Create a refined cinematic group portrait of exactly five young noblewomen in traditional Chinese Hanfu standing in a shallow V formation, with the central woman slightly forward and tallest. Their faces should be intentionally anonymized with soft rectangular skin-toned blur masks, while the clothing and hair remain highly detailed. Each woman wears an elegant layered Hanfu with wide flowing sleeves, cream and ivory outer robes, teal-blue skirts, muted coral-red sashes, and delicate floral embroidery; include exactly five distinct outfits: left woman in ivory robe with teal skirt and coral band, second woman in pale aqua robe with cream chest panel and red skirt accents, center woman in the most ornate ivory robe with peach floral borders over teal and coral layers, fourth woman partly behind in teal upper robe with ivory collar and orange sash, right woman in ivory robe over deep teal and rust-red skirt with large floral embroidery. Style their hair in traditional high black updos with long straight hair sections and ornate gold-and-flower hairpins, dangling ornaments, and small white blossoms. Set them indoors against a soft teal-green wall with dark wooden architectural details on the right and blurred pale pink cherry blossoms framing the upper corners. Use warm diffused studio lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, embroidered details, serene ceremonial atmosphere, symmetrical composition, full-body to three-quarter framing, painterly photorealism, no text, no watermark. Overall color palette: ivory, teal, coral, rust red, soft pink, warm gold. Main clothing style: Chinese Hanfu. Number of women: five. Background setting: elegant teal indoor palace backdrop with cherry blossoms. Face treatment: soft anonymized rectangular blur masks over the faces.
